text:
There once was a cat who loved disco dancing. She loved the tunes so much that when she heard them on the radio she'd jump into her owner's arms swinging her arms.

One day her humans took her to a disco party. The lights were loud, people were slick, and everyone was dancing. The cat loved it. She swayed back and forth like a ballerina.

A handsome fox entered the club. He danced with a dozen ladies before asking hershonately.

"Good night," he said.

"Oh fox," she replied.

She danced away with him.

At dawn, they were discovered. The owners felt terrible. They begged her forgiveness.

"What good deed did you do?" they asked.

"I just danced with my boyfriend."

She smiled. That night she danced every night. Friends joined her. Her owners laughed. People admired her grace. The city loved their charming disco singer.

She danced until her whiskers fell out. But the love she had made? That lasted a
